message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first StorageHandle::new in MCP audit recorders (tick 304)

Migrates the 2 production `StorageHandle::new` call sites in the MCP
audit recorder helpers (both `mcp.rs` and `mcp_helpers.rs` have a
parallel `record_mcp_audit_via_db_path` / audit-via-block_on helper):

**`mcp.rs` L631:**

- `StorageHandle::new(&db_path_str)` →
  `StorageHandle::new_with_cx(&audit_open_cx, &db_path_str)` inside
  the block_on audit-recording path.

**`mcp_helpers.rs` L549:**

- Same migration pattern in the helper-crate parallel implementation.

Both audit recorders spawn a fresh CompatRuntime to open storage and
record the MCP audit action. Previously cx-insensitive — cx-cancel
during audit recording had to wait for the DB open + audit write to
complete before observing cancel. Now the DB open itself is
cancel-aware via `new_with_cx`.

Combined with tick 253/258 (mcp_helpers + mcp audit record migrations)
and tick 303 (mcp_tools storage opens), the entire MCP audit +
tool-dispatch surface is now fully cx-threaded.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(5 warnings baseline).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 118 (187-304).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 68 (prior 66 + mcp/mcp_helpers 2).
main.rs cross-crate total: 236 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
